title: ljs Test262 Conformance Report / Baseline
description: Schema for both the emitted conformance report (--report) and the stored baseline (--update-baseline). A baseline is a report plus the passing-id set used for regression detection.

subset.description: Path or pattern the run was restricted to (FR-008). Empty/'.' means whole suite.

pinned_commit.description: The vendored Test262 commit hash this run was executed against (FR-012).

conformance_pct.description: passed / (passed + failed) * 100; skips excluded from the denominator.

generated_at.description: Timestamp recorded when a baseline is written (informational; not used in comparison).

results.description: Per-execution results. Optional in a baseline (which may store only passing_ids).

path.description: Test file path relative to the suite root.

reason.description: Present on fail/skip; absent on pass.

passing_ids.description: Baseline only: ids ('<path>#<mode>') that passed; the regression-detection set (FR-009).

regressions.description: Report only: passing_ids in the baseline that did NOT pass this run.

improvements.description: Report only: ids that passed this run but were not in the baseline.
